headline: Tokenization Will Reach $4T By 2028 And Ethereum And Solana Will Not Be The Primary Beneficiaries, Standard Chartered Says
summary: Tokenized assets are set to balloon to $4 trillion by 2028 and decentralized finance protocols not Ethereum or Solana will be the primary beneficiaries, according to Standard Chartered. Non-stablecoin tokenized assets will reach $2 trillion and stablecoins will also reach...

headline: Assessing BlackRock (BLK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Assessing BlackRock’s Recent Share Performance BlackRock (BLK) has drawn fresh attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock closing at US$1,051.57 and showing mixed returns over the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for BlackRock. Recent trading has been choppy, with the 1-day share price return of 1.47% coming after the stock declined 3.89% over 7 days and is still down 3.09% year to date. At the same time, longer term total shareholder returns...
